use_cases: Display portfolio or brand names with animated letter effects on hero sections
Create visually striking headings for creative landing pages
Add depth and visual interest to text-based UI elements
Replace specific letters with 3D-animated visuals for branding purposes
ai_summary: A decorative text component that replaces a targeted letter with an animated 3D-style visual element. Uses SVG filters and drop-shadow effects to create depth and a skeuomorphic appearance. Ideal for portfolio sites, creative landing pages, or any context where typography needs visual impact and subtle animation.
